pages.text: The $(thing)Export Bus$() automatically pushes items from the Magic Storage network into an adjacent container, filtered by item type.

$(thing)Setting a filter:$() $(thing)Right-click$() the Export Bus with any item in hand to set it as the filter. The bus will only export that specific item type.$(br2)To $(thing)clear$() the filter, right-click with an empty hand.$(br2)The filter checks item type and NBT data - an enchanted pickaxe won't match a plain one.

$(thing)Operation:$()$(br)$(li)Works every $(thing)10 ticks$() (0.5 seconds)$(li)Exports up to $(thing)one full stack (64 items)$() per operation$(li)Only extracts the amount the target can accept$(li)Only exports when the filter item matches$(li)Auto-finds the network Core, throttled when no Core is present$(br2)If the target container is full, items stay in the network.

$(thing)Use cases:$()$(br)$(li)Auto-feed furnaces from network storage$(li)Sort specific items out of the network$(li)Fill up machines that need constant input$(li)Connect to other mods' automation systems$(br2)Place multiple Export Buses with different filters to sort items into labeled chests!
